hooks.command: if [ -d "./docs/context" ]; then FILES=$(find ./docs/context -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "[HARNESS:context] Available project context:"; echo "$FILES" | sed 's|^|  |'; else echo "[HARNESS:context] docs/context/ exists but empty — use project-context skill to create"; fi; fi
S=$(jq -r '.tool_input.skill // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$S" ] && "$HOME/.local/bin/harness-event" emit skill-start --skill "$S" --runtime claude; true
